array.name: _2130968576_res_0x7f040000
array.item: Maintain a balanced diet and ensure sufficient nutrient intake. Exercise regularly to keep in shape.
Try to slow down while eating, chew more before swallowing and cut down on carbonated beverages. Also avoid sitting for long periods of time, as this can cause fat to build up at your waist.

If you want to lose weight you can try to eat less at dinner, eat until you are only about half-full. Stop eating midnight snacks and staying up late, don\'t eat within %d hours of going to bed. Also avoid sitting for long periods of time and fix your drinking habits.
Increase your intake of dietary fiber while reducing high-fat foods. Work out your core with exercises such as sit-ups, plank, and more. Try to cut beer out of your diet too.

array.name: _2130968578_res_0x7f040002
array.item: The fat on your body is evenly distributed.
The fat on your arms is unevenly distributed. Your right arm is trimmer.
The fat on your arms is unevenly distributed. Your left arm is trimmer.
The fat on your legs is unevenly distributed. Your right leg is trimmer.
The fat on your body is unevenly distributed. Your right side is trimmer.
The fat on your body is unevenly distributed. Your left arm and right leg are trimmer.
The fat on your legs is unevenly distributed. Your left leg is trimmer.
The fat on your body is unevenly distributed. Your right arm and left leg are trimmer.
The fat on your body is unevenly distributed. Your left side is trimmer.

array.name: _2130968580_res_0x7f040004
array.item: Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm is stronger.
Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm is stronger.
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left leg is stronger.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left side is stronger.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm and left leg are stronger
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right leg is stronger.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm and right leg are stronger.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right side is stronger.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left leg is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left side is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm and left leg are stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right leg is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm and right leg are stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right side is stronger, and your overall arm strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your arm muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left leg is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left side is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right arm and left leg are stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your leg muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right leg is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your left arm and right leg are stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.
Your muscles are unevenly distributed. Your right side is stronger, and your overall leg strength tends to be weaker.

array.name: _2130968581_res_0x7f040005
array.item: Exercise regularly and practice good habits to stay healthy.
Focus on your weak side while exercising to balance things out.

array.name: _2130968582_res_0x7f040006
array.item: Your muscle mass and body fat levels are a little low. Maintaining this figure could have a negative impact on your health.
You have a moderate amount of muscle and a low amount of fat. You have a slim muscular figure.
You have plenty of muscle and a low body fat content. This physique is comparable to a professional athlete.

array.name: _2130968583_res_0x7f040007
array.item: You have a healthy figure, but your visceral and subcutaneous fat is starting to build up.
You have a pretty healthy figure, but your visceral fat levels are a little high.
You have a solid figure with well-developed muscles, especially your arms and legs, but you also have higher levels of visceral fat.

array.name: _2130968584_res_0x7f040008
array.item: Try to keep a balanced diet, and increase your intake of fish and meat. Exercising more will make you feel happier and increase your appetite.
Keep up a balanced diet and regular exercise to maintain your figure.

array.name: _2130968585_res_0x7f040009
array.item: Try strength training such as using weight lifting, push-ups, and pull-ups to fill out your muscles.
Keep up a balanced diet and regular exercise to maintain your figure.

array.name: _2130968586_res_0x7f04000a
array.item: Try increasing aerobic exercise (such as swimming and jogging) and strength training (such as air squats and push-ups).
Try to reduce the oil in your diet. High-intensity aerobic exercise like intervals will help burn fat and increase your metabolism.

array.name: _2130968587_res_0x7f04000b
array.item: Your waist-to-hip ratio is a little high, which could be an indicator of high levels of visceral fat around your waist. This could increase the risk of developing diabetes, high blood pressure, and other conditions.
Your waist-to-hip ratio is in the normal range.

array.name: _2130968588_res_0x7f04000c
array.item: Increase aerobic exercise to help burn fat.

array.name: _2130968589_res_0x7f04000d
array.item: Your body fat percentage is a little low. Extremely low levels can affect physiological functions including the cardiovascular, endocrinal, reproductive, skeletal, and central nervous systems.

Your body fat percentage is normal. A healthy amount of fat is important for physiological functions including the cardiovascular, endocrinal, reproductive, skeletal, and central nervous systems. Maintain a balanced diet and regular exercise to stay healthy.
Your body fat levels are a little high. A healthy amount of fat is important, but too much can lead to health risks.
Your body fat levels are high, which increase the risk of developing cardiac disease, high blood pressure, diabetes, back problems, osteoarthritis, and other conditions.

array.name: _2130968590_res_0x7f04000e
array.item: Having a comparatively low fat-free body mass will slow down your metabolism, weaken your immune system, accelerate aging, and increase the risk of metabolic syndrome, bone fractures, and other ailments.
Having a comparatively standard fat-free body mass plays an important role in maintaining a normal metabolism as well as bone and joint health.
Having a comparatively large fat-free body mass can improve your metabolism, reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes, and give you a more healthy and vibrant physique.

array.name: _2130968591_res_0x7f04000f
array.item: Low limb skeletal muscle mass can affect athletic performance and reduce your muscle\'s ability to react. This can be more dangerous for older people as it affects balance and increases the risk of fractures when falling.
A healthy amount of limb skeletal muscle mass is good for control during athletics. It can also help stabilize your joints and improve overall balance.
Your limb skeletal muscle is well-developed, giving you good balance and solid athletic performance.

array.name: _2130968592_res_0x7f040010
array.item: You have a healthy amount of visceral fat, perfect for protecting your organs.
Higher levels of visceral fat can increase the risk of health problems involving the respiratory, digestive, and cardiovascular systems.
Too much visceral fat presents a risk to the respiratory, digestive, and cardiovascular systems.

A higher visceral fat level increases the risk of fatty liver. This can affect the functionality of organs, increasing the risk of diabetes, fatty liver, high blood pressure, cardiovascular disease, respiratory problems, and more.

array.name: _2130968593_res_0x7f040011
array.item: Your heart rate is a little low, this could indicate you have poor circulation if you aren\'t a very active person.
You have a healthy heart rate, this is an indicator of good heart health and means your body is functioning well.
Your heart rate is a little high. If your heart rate stays at an elevated rate for a long period of time, it could affect long-term health.

Your heart rate is a little high, if your heart rate stays at an elevated rate for a long period of time, it could affect long term functionality. If your heart rate is high even while you\'re resting, you should seek medical advice.

array.name: _2130968594_res_0x7f040012
array.item: Increase your protein intake for a more nutrient rich diet. Try to get more exercise to increase your metabolism and improve your build.
Maintain a balanced diet and regular exercise to stay healthy.
Try to avoid foods high in calories and fat. Increase aerobic exercise and strength training to help control your weight.
Try to avoid foods high in calories and fat. Increase aerobic exercise, but avoid exercises that may put added stress on your leg joints such as climbing, skipping, and playing basketball.

array.name: _2130968595_res_0x7f040013
array.item: Focus on a balanced diet with nutrients from a variety of sources. Exercise more for a healthier body and to increase your appetite.
Sticking to a healthy routine with a balanced diet and exercise will keep you healthy.
Proportionally increase your intake of grains and fiber rich foods in your diet, while exercising about %d minutes a day to improve your health.
Try to control your caloric intake and reduce the amount of high-fat food in your diet. Increase aerobic exercise such as running and cycling to burn fat.

array.name: _2130968596_res_0x7f040014
array.item: Increase the proportion of protein-rich foods in your diet and avoid high-fat foods. Try doing aerobic exercise %1$d to %2$d times a week for no more than %3$d minutes each session.
Maintain good dietary habits and a balanced nutritional intake, and get about %2$d minutes of aerobic exercise, such as jogging and cycling, at least %1$d times a week.
Maintain a balanced diet with good nutrients and regular exercise to stay healthy.

array.name: _2130968597_res_0x7f040015
array.item: Increase your intake of high-quality protein, avoiding foods high in calories and fat. Try increasing strength training such as weight lifting and using other workout machines.
Maintain a balanced diet and ensure sufficient nutrient intake. Exercise regularly to keep in shape.

array.name: _2130968598_res_0x7f040016
array.item: Try to get in %1$d–%2$d strength training workouts a week, making sure to hydrate well afterwards. Aim for at least %3$d to %4$d hours of sleep every night.

Maintain a balanced diet, making sure you get enough protein every day. Alternate between aerobic exercise and strength training throughout the week. Aim for %1$d-%2$d aerobic sessions a week, about %3$d minutes each time, and %4$d to %5$d strength training sessions a week.

Maintain a balanced diet, making sure you get enough protein every day. Try to get in %1$d-%2$d aerobic workouts a week, each workout should last between %3$d and %4$d minutes. Don\'t forget to stretch afterwards.

array.name: _2130968599_res_0x7f040017
array.item: Increase the intake of protein rich foods in your diet, such as egg whites, fish, and shrimp. Try to get in %1$d-%2$d strength training workouts a week, including air squats, weight lifting, and more.

Maintain a balanced diet and avoid fried foods and other foods high in fat. Alternate between aerobic exercise and strength training throughout the week. The best time to exercise is between %1$d and %2$d in the afternoon, try to finish by %3$d PM at the latest. Remember to hydrate after working out.

Maintain a balanced diet and avoid fried foods and other foods high in fat. Try to get in %1$d to %2$d aerobic workouts a week, each workout should last between %3$d and %4$d minutes. Don\'t forget to stretch afterwards.

array.name: _2130968600_res_0x7f040018
array.item: Drink at least %1$d ml of water (including plain water, light tea, and herbal tea) per day. Avoid drinking too quickly or too much. Regular aerobic exercise can help improve your body\'s water retention capacity. Remember to rehydrate promptly after exercise (unless you have edema or a weak kidney).
Drink at least %d ml of water (including plain water, light tea, and herbal tea) per day to maintain your body\'s cell osmotic pressure and acid-base balance.
Reduce your sodium intake and keep a light diet to reduce water retention. Sweating during aerobic exercise is good and helps your body metabolize excess water.

array.name: _2130968601_res_0x7f040019
array.item: Increase your intake of high-protein foods such as fish, meat, eggs, dairy, soybeans, and nuts. Try to get your nutrients from a diverse range of sources, including plant based and animal based proteins.
Maintain a balanced diet. Increase the amount of fresh fruit and vegetables you eat, such as kale, carrots, and cauliflower, to get more plant-based nutrients.
Remember to maintain a balanced diet. Moderately increase the amount of fresh fruit and vegetables you eat, such as kale, carrots, and cauliflower, to get more plant-based nutrients.

array.name: _2130968602_res_0x7f04001a
array.item: Increase the calcium and vitamin D in your diet and make sure to get enough sunlight. Fish, shrimp, and dairy products are an excellent source of calcium. If you are lactose intolerant or allergic to shellfish, you can try soymilk or yogurt instead. Eat more nuts and root vegetables as well, while decreasing the meat in your diet and cutting back on high-protein foods. Increase strength training, but be careful not to put too much stress on your leg joints.
Eat fresh vegetables and go out in the sun to increase your calcium. There is no need to take calcium supplements.

array.name: _2130968603_res_0x7f04001b
array.item: Try to stick to a healthy eating routine. Make sure to get high-quality protein (eating food such as seafood, chicken breasts, and soy based foods) every day. Snack on foods rich in potassium like bananas, milk, and oranges. Exercise at least %1$d to %2$d times a week, this can include brisk walking, jogging, or cycling. Exercise for about %3$d minutes each time, and make sure to switch up the workout for the best results.
Maintain a balanced diet and exercise at least %d times a week. Regular exercise can help you stay looking fit.

Overeating, high stress, and overly hot or cold environments can all increase your metabolism in a phenomenon called \"adaptive thermogenesis\". Try to avoid stress eating and foods high in sugar and fat. Having a positive mentality is also important in maintaining a normal metabolism.

array.name: _2130968604_res_0x7f04001c
array.item: You have a healthy body, but increasing the amount of exercise you\'re getting could make it even stronger.
You have a strong, healthy body. Keep it up.
You have a strong, healthy body. Keep it up.

array.name: _2130968605_res_0x7f04001d
array.item: A lower body weight can mean a weaker immune system, anemia, osteoporosis, and other health conditions.
Maintaining a healthy body weight is important for a strong immune system and physiological functions.

Being overweight for a long period of time can put an increased burden on your cardiovascular system as well as your joints. It can also affect physiological functions and increase the risk of developing health conditions.
Obesity can put an increased burden on your cardiovascular system as well as your joints.

array.name: _2130968606_res_0x7f04001e
array.item: Low muscle mass can reduce metabolism and weaken the immune system. It can also age the body faster and increase the risk of developing diabetes and fractures.
A healthy amount of muscle is important for protecting joints and helps with good posture. It can also increase your metabolism and slow down the aging process.
A higher muscle mass can increase your metabolism, protect your joints, and slow down the aging process.

array.name: _2130968607_res_0x7f04001f
array.item: Lower muscle mass can also lead to a slower metabolism and cause the build-up of fat. It can also wear down muscle and increase tiredness.
Almost all movement relies on the contraction of muscles. A healthy amount of muscle is important for maintaining body temperature and athletic performance.
Muscle mass is important for movement as well as protecting and stabilizing joints.

array.name: _2130968608_res_0x7f040020
array.item: Lower water content can cause health problems like slowing down your metabolism, drying out your skin, and increase aging.
Maintaining a normal water content level is important for maintaining cell shape and other physiological functions.
High water content. Maintaining a normal water content level is important for maintaining cell shape and other physiological functions.

array.name: _2130968609_res_0x7f040021
array.item: Lower protein levels affect the muscles and can weaken the immune system, cause swelling, and even increase the risk of developing anemia.
Protein is a basic element of nutrition. Maintaining a healthy protein level is important.
High protein levels can put a strain on your kidneys and lead to too much stomach acid and even osteoporosis.

array.name: _2130968610_res_0x7f040022
array.item: Bone mineral content is a little low. This means weaker bones and could lead to osteoporosis.
Bone mineral content normal. A balanced amount of inorganic salts is important for staying healthy.
Bone mineral content is a little high, a balanced amount of inorganic salts is important for staying healthy.

array.name: _2130968611_res_0x7f040023
array.item: A lower metabolism could indicate that the body is aging, and burning calories more slowly.
Basal metabolic rate measures how many calories are burned by the body while at rest. It is an indicator of how active a person is.
A higher metabolism indicates a younger body and more active metabolism, meaning more calories are burned.

array.name: _2130968612_res_0x7f040024
array.item: Having a comparatively low fat-free body mass will slow down your metabolism and weaken your immune system.
Having a comparatively large fat-free body mass can improve your metabolism, reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as diabetes, and give you a more healthy and vibrant physique.

array.name: _2130968613_res_0x7f040025
array.item: Lower muscle mass can affect strength and athletic performance, as well as encourage bad posture.
A healthy amount of muscle can help with athletic performance and healthy growth.
Higher muscle mass can make you stronger and more energetic.

array.name: _2130968614_res_0x7f040026
array.item: Low muscle mass can affect strength and encourages bad posture.
A healthy amount of muscle is important for mobility and protecting joints.

array.name: _2130968615_res_0x7f040027
array.item: Excessively low visceral fat may not appear unhealthy, but a healthy amount of visceral fat is required to protect internal organs.
A healthy amount of visceral fat is important for supporting and protecting the internal organs.
Excessively high visceral fat can affect athletic performance and put excessive pressure on the organs, affecting their functionality.

array.name: _2130968616_res_0x7f040028
array.item: Moderately increase strength training with weight lifting, squats, and sit-ups to improve core strength.
Maintain a good diet and balanced intake of nutrients, while continuing to exercise for a healthy amount of muscle.

array.name: _2130968617_res_0x7f040029
array.item: Moderately increase nutrition, and practice healthier habits by reducing the intake of unhealthy snacks and eating a wider variety of foods. Exercising will also help.
Maintain good eating habits and a balanced diet, while continuing to exercise.
Reduce high-calorie snacks, excessive eating, and sedentary behavior. Increasing physical activity such as moderate and high intensity activity can also help burn fat.
Increase your intake of dietary fiber while reducing high-fat foods. Work out your core with exercises such as sit-ups, plank, and more.

array.name: _2130968619_res_0x7f04002b
array.item: Today is a rest day. Time to let your body recover.
Today\'s low-intensity workout consists of %1$s of cardio endurance training. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout consists of %1$s of cardio endurance training. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of cardio endurance training. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of cardio endurance training. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %1$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout consists of %1$s of long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %1$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %1$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s workout consists of %1$s of threshold interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s in total.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %1$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout consists of %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout consists of %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %1$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will run approximately %2$s.

array.name: _2130968621_res_0x7f04002d
array.item: These are very simple exercises for previously sedentary individuals. Very light training load.
This is the second week of training for previously sedentary individuals. Light training load.
This is the second week of training for previously sedentary individuals. Moderate training load.
This is an easy training week for individuals with little training experience.
Moderate training week for those with short term training experience.
This is an intense training week for individuals with some short-term training experience.
Start at a low intensity to ease yourself into your plan.
This week, you\'ll keep training at a relatively low intensity level, but start adding interval sessions into your plan.
This is an intensive training week, with an emphasis on interval training to boost your VO2 max.
Improve your baseline endurance by gradually increasing your training volume. This week\'s training intensity will be kept relatively low.
Continue improving your endurance with longer training sessions at a moderate intensity.
This week includes longer sessions and a higher training volume. Intense interval training will ensure a high training load.
This week launches your fitness training with a light training load.
This week, training volume and time will increase in order to improve your fitness level. Moderate training load.
This is a week that will take your fitness to a new level, with a high training volume and intense VO2max interval trainings. High training load.
This is the first week for strengthening your stamina. Training volume is high, but due to the lack of intense intervals, training load remains light.
Push your endurance to the limit with high training volume.
This week includes an extremely high training volume to maximize your fitness and stamina.
Tapering off your training to get you rested and prepared for the event.
Lower your training intensity to ensure you are rested and prepared for the event.
This is the last week of your training plan. Continue to lower the volume and intensity of your training so you are in top shape next week.
It is race day. You are now ready to give it your all. Good luck!

array.name: _2130968622_res_0x7f04002e
array.item: Today is a rest day. Time to let your body recover.
Today\'s low-intensity workout consists of %2$s of cardio endurance training. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout consists of %2$s of cardio endurance training. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of cardio endurance training. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of cardio endurance training. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of continuous long-distance training with warm-up and cool-down exercises. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of alternating interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout consists of %2$s of threshold interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of threshold interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout consists of %2$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of VO2max interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout consists of %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval includes %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s low-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s keep-fit workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s fitness improvement workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.
Today\'s high-intensity workout includes %2$s of speed interval training. Each interval consists of %3$s of running and %4$s of rest. You will train for approximately %1$s.

array.name: _2130968624_res_0x7f040030
array.item: This is an easy training week for individuals with little training experience.
Moderate training week for those with short term training experience.
This is an intense training week for individuals with some short-term training experience.
Start at a low intensity to ease yourself into your plan.
This week, you\'ll keep training at a moderate intensity level, but start adding interval sessions into your plan to improve your VO2max and threshold pace.
Increase the intensity of your training sessions, and start focusing on your interval training to boost your VO2max.
Improve your baseline endurance by gradually increasing your training volume. This week\'s training intensity will be kept relatively low.
Continue improving your endurance with longer training sessions at a moderate intensity.
Increase both the duration and intensity of your runs this week to embed the gains you have been making.
Our goal is to run longer distances, but we\'ll start out easy this week.
You\'ll go on longer runs this week to improve stamina. Longer intervals have been set up to improve threshold pace. This is a moderate training load.
Challenge your limits by further increasing the duration and intensity of your runs. Keep powering on towards your goal.
Training will be relatively easy this week to give your body a chance to recover. Stick to low intensity and low to mid-range endurance training.
Push your endurance to the limit with high training volume.
Maximize your stamina through high-volume training.
Tapering off your training to get you rested and prepared for the event.
Lower your training intensity to consolidate your gains.
This is the last week of your training plan. Continue to lower the volume and intensity of your training to give your body a chance to fully recover.
It is race day. You are now ready to give it your all. Good luck!

array.name: _2130968625_res_0x7f040031
array.item: The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is ideal for sleeping.
The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is fine and isn\'t louder than a breeze.
The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is fine and isn\'t louder than the light patter of rain.

The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is a little noisy and is comparable to the sound of the tide on the beach.

Your sleep quality is closely related to the noise level of your environment. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is comparable to birds chirping in the forest. You can try using white noise to block it out.

The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is noisy and is comparable to fireworks outside. You can try using white noise to block it out.

The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is very noisy and is comparable to a professor holding a class. You can try using white noise to block it out. Improving your sleeping environment is important for your health.

The noise level of your environment is closely related to your sleep quality. Your ambient environment averages %1$s dB, this is extremely noisy and is comparable to a thunderstorm outside. You can try using white noise to block it out. Improving your sleeping environment is important for your health.

array.name: _2130968628_res_0x7f040034
array.item: Meditate to think more rationally and assess what you need in your diet.
Practicing mindfulness helps you recharge and be more in control.

array.name: _2130968639_res_0x7f04003f
array.item: Factoring in your age it seems like you could push yourself a little harder. Being healthier will do a lot more than you think.
Factoring in your age you are perfectly on track.
Factoring in your age you are doing great!
Factoring in your age you are in excellent physical shape. Keep up the amazing work!

array.name: _2130968718_res_0x7f04008e
array.item: Rest is just as important as exercise.
Watch your form when working out.
Success comes to those who persevere.
Lack of sleep can lead to worse sessions and more fat gained.
Make sure to get enough sleep for more energy.
Don\'t exercise until at least an hour after eating.
Don\'t forget to replenish your electrolytes after sweating a lot.
Don\'t exercise intensely outdoors on a hot day.
Get plenty of fluids when you sweat.
Remember to stay hydrated, don\'t wait until you are thirsty.
Make sure to drink small amounts of water during exercise.
In a cold environment, several thin layers of clothing is better than one thick layer.
Remember to warm-up properly before your workout.
Sweating and fat burn are not directly correlated. High temperature workouts can be harmful if not properly managed.
Excessive dieting is proven to negatively affect your performance and metabolism.
Take care of your body. It\'s the only one you\'ve got.
Time passes differently when you\'re in motion.
You might find it difficult to start, but once you do, you\'ll surprise yourself.
Exercise burns sugar, fat, and protein.
Be swift, be fast, be sleek.
Sometimes, a workout is the best medicine.
Regular exercise can help with depression.
Regular exercise can improve your quality of sleep and help you fall asleep faster.
Regular exercise can help prevent or control high blood pressure.
Once you have a regular routine, exercise gets easier and easier.
Exercise will give you a glow of health.
Exercise builds a stronger body and a stronger mind.
Health is the foundation for happiness.
Rest your mind to face tomorrow\'s challenges.
Health is a state of body. Wellness is a state of being.
Early to bed and early to rise makes a man healthy, wealthy and wise.
Push your limits, but listen to your body.
Remember those cool-down stretches after your workout.
Avoid rapid changes in temperature following exercise.
Get plenty of protein after exercise to repair your muscle tissue.
Get lean and slim through consistent exercising.
Prevent osteoporosis with vitamin D, calcium, and regular exercise.
Replenish your body after your workout with healthy food.
Make sure to rest well after exercising.
Get pumped for your workout with some great music.
Make sure to drink plenty of water during and after your workout.
Sweat is the byproduct of your hard work.
Stretch properly after exercise to relieve fatigue and aid recovery.
Choose the right place to run.
Listen to your body when you run.
Good running shoes are your joints\' best friends.
Running consumes sugars more quickly than fat.
Avoid running faster than you can keep up on the treadmill to prevent injuries.
Not resting properly after running can lead to poor blood circulation.
Try to keep cool while exercising.
Keep your muscles loose and limber.
Adjust your pace and breathing if you\'re getting out of breath.
Control your diet to lose weight faster.
If you experience any pain during running, stop exercising immediately.
Lower body strength training is an important addition to workout routines.
Take long, deep breaths when running to maximize oxygen intake.
Pay attention to passing vehicles if you are running on the road.
When summer days are long, go for a nice night run.
Find it difficult to run long distances? Get a running partner to help you stay motivated and reach your goals.
A good pair of running shoes will get you far.
Choose wide, level running surfaces for your jog.
